notes: Sort the array in descending order and sum the first 3 elements. Time Complexity
legend:
Arrays, Sorting, Greedy.

In the ECPC, a team consists of exactly 3 members. You have $N$ students, and each student has a programming skill level $S_i$. You want to form exactly one team of 3 members such that the total sum of their skill levels is as maximum as possible.
output: Print a single integer representing the maximum possible skill sum of a 3-member team.
input:
The first line contains an integer $N$ ($3 \le N \le 10^5$) --- the number of available students.
The second line contains $N$ integers $S_1, S_2, \dots, S_N$ ($1 \le S_i \le 10^4$) --- the skill level of each student.
name: Team Formation
